![[IMG_20260127_090024.jpg]]
N=L+S
M=K+S
S=N-L=M-K


L-inputs
K-outputs
determined by the description of task

S-internar state viariable
determined by Huffma's method for synchronous sequencial circuits

program -> achieved from application of Huffman's method up to composite K-map (step 5)

composite K-map is the source of information for writing microprogram

---

# ilustration

| \                    | $x_{1}x_{2}$ |     |     |     |      |
| -------------------- | ------------ | --- | --- | --- | ---- |
| $Q_{1}^{n}Q_{0}^{n}$ | 00           | 01  | 11  | 10  | P1P2 |
| 00                   | 00           |     | 01  | 00  | 10   |
| 01                   | 11           |     | 01  | 01  | 00   |
| 11                   | 11           |     | 10  | 11  | 01   |
| 10                   | 00           |     | 10  | 10  | 00   |
								$Q_{1}^{n+1}Q_{0}^{n+1}$

2-inputs
2-outputs
2-internal state cycles

Step ⑥ 

| $Q_{1}^{n}Q_{0}^{n}x_{1}x_{2}$ | $Q_{1}^{n+1}Q_{0}^{n+1}P_{1}P_{2}$ |
| ------------------------------ | ---------------------------------- |
| $A_{3}A_{2}A_{1}A_{0}$         | $Y_{3}Y_{2}Y_{1}Y_{0}$             |
| 0000                           | 0010                               |
| 0011                           | 0110                               |
| 0010                           | 0010                               |
| ===                            | ===                                |
| 0100                           | 1100                               |
| 0111                           | 0100                               |
| 0110                           | 0100                               |
| ===                            | ===                                |
| 1100                           | 1101                               |
| 1111                           | 1001                               |
| 1110                           | 1101                               |
| ===                            | ===                                |
| 1000                           | 0000                               |
| 1011                           | 1000                               |
| 1010                           | 1000                               |


| HEX | HEX |
| --- | --- |
| A   | Y   |
| 0   | 2   |
| 3   | 6   |
| 2   | 2   |
| === | === |
| 4   | C   |
| 7   | 4   |
| 6   | 4   |
| === | === |
| C   | D   |
| F   | 9   |
| E   | D   |
| === | === |
| 8   | 0   |
| B   | 8   |
| A   | 8   |
